name: Mirror Of Life
short_description: Episode 1: A murder has been committed and it is unknown who committed it. Will he be able to solve this murder with Detective Oliver and a person he doesn't know? In this process, you can choose not to trust anyone...
detailed_description:
IN THE GAME DEVELOPMENT PROCESS

Info : This game is made by one person

Mirror Of Life

Yes, a murder was committed today and I still haven't been able to solve it.
Strange things are happening, it's like none of what's happening around me is real.
I forget some events or I'm dreaming.
Sometimes I can't tell if my dreams are real or imagined.
Maybe I should get my head together and solve this murder now.

Episode Information

Each episode consists of a different story.
Sections may have connections among themselves.
You are the detective in Episode 1, but you decide who you are in the other episodes.

Friend

You can play with your friends and reach different endings.
You can have a pleasant time with your friends and have sweet snacks.
It is played with a maximum of 4 people.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
